column1: # Beckhoff EtherCAT bus couplers — passive segment devices.
# No PDOs, no OD parameters the master needs to touch. They show up on
# discovery, walk the ESM, and forward frames. Source: LinuxCNC-ethercat
# `type=coupler` is a miniOS convention: DeviceDB::configure_from_db skips
# any TSV record with this type (nothing to write).
# E-bus coupler, default Beckhoff entry device. No user I/O.
# EK1100 + hex ID switch + 2-digit display. Still no user PDOs.
# EtherCAT extension / RJ45 daisy-chain downlink. No PDOs.
# EK1122 in IP67. Same PDO=none semantics.
